content:
# Session 52 (iter-052) — Summary

## Metadata
- **Iter:** 052 | **Lanes:** 3 (FlatteningStratification / GrassmannianQuot / SectionGradedRing)
- **Sorry count:** global unchanged. Per file: Flattening 1→1 (genericFlatness), GrassmannianQuot 5→5 (scaffolds), SectionGradedRing 0→0.
- **New decls:** +10 axiom-clean, 0 new sorry. All verified `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (spot-checked `gf_flat_base_local_on_source`, `gf_stalk_flat_localBase`, `glueData_bridge_tgt`, `isIso_sheafification_map_unit`).
- **Build:** final `lake build` GREEN (only scaffold-sorry warnings). sync_leanok iter-052 sha 1bfd414: **+8/-0**. blueprint-doctor: **0 findings**. dag gaps=0, unmatched=7.

## Lane outcomes

### GF — FlatteningStratification (G3 anchors landed; close still blocked)
- **`gf_patch_free_imp_flat` (G3.1) SOLVED** — `Module.Flat.of_free` (free⟹flat) one-liner. L2719.
- **`gf_flat_base_local_on_source` (G3.3) SOLVED** — `Module.flat_of_isLocalized_maximal` instantiated at the SOURCE ring `B`'s maximal ideals (`LocalizedModule Q.primeCompl N`, maps `LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap`). The effort-breaker's "feared-deep source-reduction" is a one-line Mathlib instantiation — no infra gap. L2732.
- **`gf_stalk_flat_localBase` (G3.4) SOLVED — but stalk-FREE** — `IsLocalization.flat R' S` + `Module.Flat.trans R R' N`. The blueprint statement is over sheaf-module stalks (`F_y` flat over `O_{S,x}`); the Lean pin proves the abstract algebraic core (localization-transitivity of flatness). The geometric stalk instantiation is NOT formalizable (no `SheafOfModules.stalk`). L2746. **Review added a `% NOTE:` reconciling the two.**
- **`gf_stalk_flat_over_base` (G3.2), `gf_flat_locality_assembly`, `genericFlatness` BLOCKED.** Two distinct walls: (1) the G3.2 statement cannot be TYPED — Mathlib has no `SheafOfModules.stalk` (loogle: 0); (2) the stalk-free algebraic kernel needs `gf_flat_localizedModule_sameBase` (localize the SOURCE `B`-action, base `R` fixed) which is Mathlib-absent (only the wrong-base `of_isLocalizedModule`). `genericFlatness` sorry retained verbatim (no relocation, no signature change). **The blueprinted stalk route is a confirmed dead end** — re-spec around `Module.flat_of_isLocalized_span` (source-span descent) + two geometric bridges.

### GR-quot — GrassmannianQuot (C2 transport + signature landed)
- **`pullbackBaseChangeTransport` SOLVED** — `(pullbackComp p a).symm.app Mᵢ ≪≫ (pullback p).mapIso g ≪≫ (pullbackComp p b).app Mⱼ`. This is the exact ingredient whose absence caused the iter-051 whnf-runaway; whnf-safe because the morphisms stay abstract glue-datum legs. L196.
- **`glueData_bridge_{src,mid,tgt}` SOLVED** — triple-overlap endpoint equalities (`pullback.condition`, `t_fac`, `t_inv`, `cocycle_assoc`); pure Scheme-cat morphism equalities so plain `rw` is safe. L209/218/230.
- **`glue` `_hC2` signature SOLVED (body still sorry)** — well-typed triple-overlap multiplicativity `Iso`-equality with `pullbackCongr(bridge)` insertions as type-aligners; validated as a standalone `example`. Both planned lane-2 deliverables complete; body deferred to iter-053+ (descent construction).

### SNAP — SectionGradedRing (crux reduced to one abelian gap)
- **`isIso_sheafification_map_iff` SOLVED** — `inverseImage_W_toPresheaf_eq_inverseImage_isomorphisms` specialised: `IsIso(sheafification.map f) ↔ J.W(toPresheaf.map f)`. GOTCHA: `rw` needs `isomorphisms` arg written as `SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf` (NOT the non-reducible `X.Modules` def); defeq ascription bridges them. L214.
- **`localIso_toPresheaf_map_unit` SOLVED** — `toPresheaf_map_sheafificationAdjunction_unit_app` (rfl, = `toSheafify`) then `W_toSheafify`. The `η_P ∈ J.W` ingredient. L239.
- **`isIso_sheafification_map_unit` SOLVED** — `(isIso_sheafification_map_iff _).mpr (localIso_toPresheaf_map_unit P)`; un-whiskered `m=0` case. L251.
- **`isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` BLOCKED** — reduced to exactly one abelian statement `J.W(toPresheaf.map(η_P ▷ Q))` = relative-⊗ right-whiskering of an abelian local iso stays in `J.W`. `W.whiskerRight` (Mathlib) does not close it (abelian ℤ-tensor vs relative `R(U)`-tensor). All 3 routes Mathlib-blocked: coequalizer-presentation of `P ⊗_R Q` absent; `MonoidalClosed (PresheafOfModules)` absent; module-sheaf stalks absent. Lowest-cost next step = build the coequalizer presentation brick.

## Cross-lane finding
Two independent lanes (GF-G3.2, SNAP route-c) hit the SAME missing primitive: **module-sheaf stalks for `SheafOfModules`**. Mathlib has none. Recorded as a Known Blocker.

## Review subagent dispositions (full reports in `.archon/task_results/`)
- **lean-auditor `iter052`** (6 must-fix, 3 major, 2 minor): all 10 new decls genuine + axiom-clean. The 6 must-fix are the EXPECTED honest sorries (5 GR-quot scaffolds + genericFlatness). 3 majors are **stale `.lean` comments** review cannot edit → recommendations §TOP: "iter-177+" dead ref + "GAP G1 NOT yet available" (G1 is CLOSED in the same file) + `gf_stalk_flat_localBase` name/docstring honesty.
- **lvb `flat-iter052`** (2 major blueprint-side, Lean correct): G3.4 `\uses`/proof-sketch describe the stalk route the Lean doesn't take; genericFlatness proof relies on absent stalk infra. Both → `% NOTE:` added (see manual markers).
- **lvb `grquot-iter052`** (1 major, 3 minor): `chartQuotientMap_ιFree` is `private` but blueprinted by public name — **false alarm**, sync_leanok resolves private names fine (its `\leanok` is present, removed=0; SNAP privates also marked). Coverage debt: 3 bridges unblueprinted.
- **lvb `snap-iter052`** (0 must-fix, 3 major coverage-debt): the 3 new reduction lemmas are genuine + axiom-clean but lack blueprint blocks; crux + tensorPowAdd correctly shown open.

## Notes (LOW)
- Project convention is **statement-block-only `\leanok`** (0 proof-block `\leanok` across all chapters). The lvb "sync_leanok gap" finding on `genericFlatnessAlgebraic`/`gf_polynomial_core` proof blocks is the convention, NOT a sync miss — left untouched (consistent with iter-051).
- Iter-specific comment rot flagged in SNAP handoff block ("NEW in iter-052"/"ITER-052 STATUS") — cosmetic.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_FlatteningStratification.tex`, `lem:gf_stalk_flat_localBase`: added `% NOTE:` (iter-052) — Lean pin proves the stalk-FREE algebraic core (localization-transitivity); geometric stalk application needs absent `SheafOfModules.stalk`; `\uses{lem:gf_stalk_flat_over_base}` is misleading (Lean doesn't use it), flagged for planner to drop.
- `Picard_FlatteningStratification.tex`, `thm:generic_flatness` (proof block): added `% NOTE:` (iter-052) — sorry is HONEST; Step 4 routes through stalk-phrased `gf_flat_locality_assembly`/`gf_stalk_flat_over_base`, blocked by absent `SheafOfModules.stalk`; re-spec around `Module.flat_of_isLocalized_span`.
- No manual `\leanok` overrides (sync_leanok +8/-0 trusted; private-decl resolution confirmed working).
